_comment: TGC Editorial Image Map — Maps each article slug to its correct image type based on article tags and region. This file does NOT replace existing images; it defines what type each article SHOULD have when images are generated.

_image_types.A: Branded typographic card (1200x630 JPEG, article-hero.py) — daily briefings, editorial
_image_types.B: AI illustration via Replicate Flux (abstract editorial, no photorealism, no faces) — research, science, industry
_image_types.C: Wikimedia Commons CC-licensed photo + house duotone treatment (tgc-duotone.py) — civic, human, place

_no_repeat_rule: No image reused within 30 days OR 15 articles, whichever is longer. Check ~/.hermes/tgc-image-log.json before assigning; log after publishing.

_classification_rules.Policy/Legislation/Law: Type C — civic imagery (parliament, courts, documents)
_classification_rules.Patient Stories/Access/Healthcare: Type C — human imagery (clinical, pharmacy, consultation)
_classification_rules.Research/Science/Medical: Type B — abstract illustration (lab, molecular, research)
_classification_rules.Industry/Business/Market: Type B or C — facilities (cultivation, supply chain)
_classification_rules.Daily Briefing: Type A — branded card (keep existing hero card system)
